strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with proven depth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating recent exposure to emerging AI integration technologies
Broad technical fluency across multiple languages and platforms (TypeScript, D, C++, Java) with demonstrated ability to learn and apply new tools
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; AI experience is infrastructure-focused (code generators, frameworks) rather than core AI/ML strategy or product development
No evidence of building AI products or platforms, and limited demonstration of strategic leadership required for director-level advisor role guiding customers and partners
Resume contains name/email/URL inconsistency (AISHA OKONKWO vs szabobogdan contact details), raising authenticity and identity verification concerns
response.justification: The candidate has substantial general software engineering experience and current exposure to AI infrastructure work. However, the Principal Engineer role specifically requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' and director-level strategic capabilities to advise customers on cutting-edge technologies and identify future product directions. The resume demonstrates individual contributor technical depth but lacks evidence of AI product ownership, strategic leadership, or the advanced degree preferred for this specialized AI strategy role. The name/contact information discrepancy also requires clarification.
